page.sign-in-description: Use your email and password to access this instance.
page.sign-up-description: Create an account on this instance. Email confirmation isn't required in v1.

board-claim.claimed-description: This instance is now linked to your authenticated user.
board-claim.sign-in-required-description: Sign in or create an account, then return to this page to claim Board ownership.
board-claim.claim-description: This will promote your user to instance admin and migrate company ownership access from local trusted mode.

cli-auth.approved-description: The Paperclip CLI can now finish authentication on the requesting machine.
cli-auth.expired-description: Start the CLI auth flow again from your terminal to generate a new approval request.
cli-auth.sign-in-required-description: Sign in or create an account, then return to this page to approve the CLI access request.
cli-auth.approve-description: A local Paperclip CLI process is requesting board access to this instance.
cli-auth.requires-instance-admin: This challenge requires instance-admin access. Sign in with an instance admin account to approve it.
cli-auth.update-failed-fallback: Failed to update CLI auth challenge

invite.not-available-description: This invite may be expired, revoked, or already used.
invite.rejected-description: This join request was not approved.
invite.already-used-description: This invite has already been used.
invite.header-eyebrow: You've been invited to join Paperclip
invite.description-agent: Review the invite details, then submit the agent information below to start the join request.
invite.description-human-needs-account: Create your Paperclip account first. If you already have one, switch to sign in and continue the invite with the same email.
invite.description-ready: Your account is ready. Review the invite details, then accept it to continue.
invite.agent-form-description: This invite will create an approval request for a new agent in {{companyName}}.
invite.create-account-description: Start with a Paperclip account. After that, you'll come right back here to accept the invite for {{companyName}}.
invite.sign-in-description: Use the Paperclip account that already matches this invite. If you do not have one yet, switch back to create account.
invite.tail-copy-create: Already signed up before? Use the existing-account option instead so the invite lands on the right Paperclip user.
invite.tail-copy-sign-in: No account yet? Switch back to create account so you can accept the invite with a new login.
invite.this-will-bootstrap: This will finish setting up Paperclip
invite.this-will-join: submit or complete your join request for {{companyName}}
invite.checking-access-error: Checking your company access. Try again in a moment.
invite.already-belongs: This account already belongs to the company.

auth.user-already-exists-info: An account already exists for {{email}}. Sign in below to continue with this invite.
auth.invalid-email-or-password: That email and password did not match an existing Paperclip account. Check both fields, or create an account first if you are new here.
auth.request-failed-401: That email and password did not match an existing Paperclip account. Check both fields, or create an account first if you are new here.
auth.request-failed-422: An account may already exist for {{email}}. Try signing in instead.

awaiting-approval.title: Request to join {{companyName}}
awaiting-approval.description: Your request is still awaiting approval. {{approver}} must approve your request to join.
awaiting-approval.ask-them-to-visit: Ask them to visit <linkTo>Company Settings → Access</linkTo> to approve your request.
awaiting-approval.refresh-hint: Refresh this page after you've been approved — you'll be redirected automatically.
